text_excerpt: --> Advice Surgeries | Meg Hillier MP top of page MEG HILLIER MP Standing up for Hackney South and Shoreditch Home About Meg News Hackney News Monthly Reports Parliament News Committee News Weekly News News Archive Weekly News Archive Contact Advice Surgeries More FAQs Visit Parliament PMQs Ballot More Use tab to navigate through the menu items. ADVICE SURGERIES I hold regular advice surgeries at Hackney Town Hall, between 10 and 12pm for constituents who would like to speak about their issues face-to face. This is a drop-in service, so no appointment is necessary. My surgeries are for my constituents only. You can find out who your MP is by entering your postcode into this website: www.writetothem.com My next surgery will be on Monday 11 May 2026. Recent Posts April 2026 Monthly Report See here for what I've been up to in Hackney and Westminster in March. Work with Meg Job Title: Constituency Support Officer (4 days a week) Working For: Meg Hillier MP (Hackney South and Shoreditch) Location: Westminster, London Salary: In line with IPSA pay scales. Pro rata 4 days a week. Meg Hillier MP is seeking a Constituency Support Officer to join her Westminster office. The successful candidate will support Meg and her team primarily by responding to enquiries from constituents. They will also assist senior colleagues across the team, by carrying Meg's Hackney Gazette Column: Market on Ridley Road is not under threat See here for my latest Hackney Gazette column.
